sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65555" key="megasxi+dh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγα-σχϊδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a great cleft</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
